title: Extended change_column_metadata Mutation for Column Settings
excerpt: We are working on column operations that would benefit greatly from expanded functionality in the change_column_metadata mutation. Specifically, we’d like the ability to update column settings, such as changing column de…

posts.author: stela_tamizi (Stela Tamizi)
posts.cookedHtml: We are working on column operations that would benefit greatly from expanded functionality in the change_column_metadata mutation. Specifically, we’d like the ability to update column settings, such as changing column defaults, ordering labels in a status column, adding labels to a status column etc, alongside the current options to change the title and description.

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @stela_tamizi,

Welcome to the community!

As this request is API-related, I’ve moved it to the apps and API feature request queue.

Best,
Rachel
